meaning: v.计算,考虑,计划,打算v.<美>以为,认为
examples: This formula is used to calculate the area of a circle.
You'll need to calculate how much time the assignment will take.
Conservationists calculate that hundreds of species could be lost in this area.
Previously, the lower 30-year U.S. government bond rates were used to calculate lump-sum pension values.
When the interest rate used to calculate a lump sum increases, the lump sum value goes down.
